description: Port the remaining AUTO/cache policy behavior from C into Rust runtime policy code.
Implement daemon mode, pidfile handling, and TCP Fast Open in the Rust runtime.
Port delayed upstream connect, cache-file stdout dumping, and related request gating semantics.
Match the remaining C timeout and staged send behavior in Rust desync execution.
Replace the ad hoc thread-per-client model with runtime behavior that matches C connection limits and lifecycle handling.
Finish Shadowsocks plugin runtime mode in the Rust binary with parity coverage.
Cut Linux over to the Rust binary, keep C as hidden oracle infrastructure, and tighten CI/release gates.
Port the deferred Windows runtime and service layer after Linux cutover is green.
